title: Create: delicious teas
description: adds 70+ new teas to the Create 6
body:
## About
Create: delicious teas adds 70+ new teas that working like a builder's tea from create but they have an unexpected effect when consumed

### content
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9664501bfeff251fd3c3c33e92dd5a848868b972.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9545d64208e82634b448c059dc00164a78aef04a.png)

### crafting teas
all added teas can be made by using mechanical mixer like that:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/760f5d99dbc594f96e5514c90671d62a2e9f5aa8.png)
